home.heroSubtitle: No forms, no setup. Just talk — it asks as it goes and organizes your experience into a deployable Skill.
home.inputPlaceholder: What experience do you want to extract? Just tell me…
home.dropHint: You can also drop in a document
home.draftFromDocsHint: Or drop in materials — I'll read your domain and draft a first version →
home.guideInputFallback: I've uploaded documents. Please read them first, then guide me.
home.importSectionHint: Already have a Skill? Import it — rewritten into the studio format to visualize, refine, validate and re-export.
home.importDropHint: Or drop in a SKILL.md / skill folder / .zip
home.importConfirmText: 将会按照 Skill Booster 的格式进行改写，请注意保留源技能
home.importScriptHint: This Skill contains {{count}} script(s) — review them before running.
home.deleteConfirmText: Delete project "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

guide.enterWorkbenchHint: Please fill in scene name, user role and trigger first
guide.errorRateLimit: The model service is rate-limited (too many requests) and auto-retries failed. Please wait about half a minute and send your message again.
guide.errorGeneric:
Something went wrong: {{message}}
You can resend your message shortly. If it keeps failing, check the model configuration in Settings.

workbench.selectSceneHint: Please select a project from home

validate.title: Validation · A/B comparison
validate.analyzing: Judging the A/B difference by dimension…
validate.controlBar: both sides {{model}} · temp {{temp}} · the only difference is the skill (SKILL.md)
validate.controlBarPending: both sides share the same model / temperature / params · the only difference is the skill (SKILL.md)

testset.empty: No test instructions yet. Click "✨ Generate 10" to have the agent draft a test set from this skill, or "+ Add" to write your own.
testset.modalPlaceholder: Enter the full test instruction (multi-line allowed)…

report.empty: No validation results yet. Run a single comparison or the test set in the Comparison tab.
report.expandHint: click to expand the A/B output

summary.noResults: Run the test set to see the win rate

numbers.tokenDiff: B +{{diff}} (the cost when the skill is active)

agents.guideDesc: Completes scene info in 2–4 opening turns and auto-names the project
agents.extractDesc: Main workbench: AI pre-fill / correction / contrastive follow-ups / anchors
agents.validateDesc: A/B comparison: bare model vs loaded Skill

conversation.welcomeTitle: ✅ Scene definition complete — you can start extracting your experience now
conversation.welcomeIntro: Tell me your experience and I'll break it into blocks on the canvas. You can:
conversation.welcomeStep1: 1. Just tell me a piece of your experience (a single case or one principle works) — I'll break it down onto the canvas;
conversation.welcomeStep2: 2. Upload reference documents on the left and click "Draft from documents" to let me build a first version;
conversation.welcomeStep3: 3. Drag blocks from the component bar in the top-left of the canvas and build it yourself.
conversation.startGuideMessage: I'm ready. Please start guiding me based on the current scene, and ask me the first question.
conversation.proposalsHint: {{count}} proposals have been placed on the canvas as dashed blocks — accept or reject them there

reference.title: References
reference.includeHint: Checked = bundled into the exported Skill package

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.openHint: Click to open with the default app
scripts.includeHint: Checked = bundled into scripts/ on export

assets.title: Assets
assets.openHint: Click to open with the default app
assets.includeHint: Checked = bundled into assets/ on export

canvas.typeRuleHint: How to judge · how to guard
canvas.noSteps: No steps yet, add one below
